embed.title: Link Cables
embed.description:
Please select a cable below for more information, or 'Summary' for an overview.
 Please note we do not advise Meta Quest Link.

embeds.title: Link Cables
embeds.description: There are many cables available for the Quest, as it only requires a USB 3.0 connection to work. In the dropdown below, you can see details on multiple cables, including photos.

fields.name: KIWI Design Link Cable
fields.value: The Kiwi Design Link Cable is a USB A to C cable that is 5 or 6 meters long, depending on which one you purchase.

fields.name: Kuject Link Cable with Charging
fields.value: USB 3.0 cable with dedicated 9V 2A charging port. Smart chip maintains battery around 78%.

fields.name: INIU Link Cable
fields.value: INIU's USB A cable can accept external power, allowing unlimited playtime regardless of your USB port's output.

fields.name: Meta Official Link Cable
fields.value: The official cable is a USB C to C fiber optic cable that makes it lightweight, but fairly expensive.

fields.name: Syntech Fast Charging Link Cable
fields.value: 2-in-1 link cable with dedicated charging port. ~2.0-2.5 Gbps data rates. Includes velcro straps and LED indicator.

embeds.title: Kiwi Design Link Cable
embeds.description: The Kiwi Design Link Cable is a copper standard cable made by a reputable company. Supports USB 3.2 Gen1 (5Gbps) with 18W charging.

fields.name: Info
fields.value:
__USB A or C (PC End)__: A 
 __90 Degree Angle__: Yes 
 __Length__: 5M/6M 
 __Speed__: USB 3.2 Gen1 (5Gbps) 
 __Charging__: 18W

embeds.title: Kuject Link Cable with Charging
embeds.description: USB 3.0 cable with dedicated 9V 2A charging port. Smart chip regulates current and maintains battery around 78%. Supports up to 5Gbps (verified ~3Gbps on Quest).

fields.name: Info
fields.value:
__USB A or C (PC End)__: A 
 __90 Degree Angle__: Yes 
 __Length__: 16FT (5M) 
 __Speed__: USB 3.0 (5Gbps) 
 __Charging__: 9V 2A (dedicated port)

embeds.title: INIU Link Cable
embeds.description: The INIU Link cable can support external power, allowing unlimited playtime regardless of your USB port's output.

fields.name: Info
fields.value:
__USB A or C (PC End)__: A 
 __90 Degree Angle__: Yes 
 Length: 5M

embeds.title: Meta Official Link Cable
embeds.description: The official cable is known to be a reliable good option as it's a lightweight thin fiber optic cable, but it is much more expensive than other options.

fields.name: Info
fields.value:
__USB A or C (PC End)__: C 
 __90 Degree Angle__: Yes 
 Length: 5M

embeds.title: Syntech Fast Charging Link Cable
embeds.description: 2-in-1 link cable with dedicated charging port. ~2.0-2.5 Gbps data rates. Includes velcro straps and LED indicator.
